entities.name: Home (Digital Space)
entities.context: Productivity tool concept where software functions as a personal digital space reflecting user's vulnerability, life history, and sense of self

entities.name: Self-actualization
entities.context: Software design as an act of personal growth and identity expression rather than mere utility

entities.name: Digital architecture
entities.context: The structure of digital tools that influences cognitive flow and emotional safety, analogous to physical architecture

entities.name: Homemaking features
entities.context: Software capabilities including deep customizability, personal history preservation, and aesthetic resonance

entities.name: Mental models
entities.context: User's cognitive frameworks that get externalized through custom workflows, naming conventions, and personal logic in software

relationships.context: Building a digital 'Home' enables self-actualization through software design
Digital architecture creates the foundation for the 'Home' experience through cognitive flow and emotional safety
Essential components that enable software to function as a personal 'Home'
Users externalize mental models when building their own 'rooms' in software, creating identity-reinforcing feedback loops
